name: Heavy Truck Retail Tax Weight Exclusions

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must purchase vehicles meeting specific Gross Vehicle Weight (GVW) or Gross Combined Weight (GCW) thresholds to avoid the 12% tax.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The 12% retail excise tax is excluded for trucks with a GVW of 33,000 lbs or less, trailers of 26,000 lbs or less, and certain tractors of 19,500 lbs or less.
